description: A Statement of Work defines the scope, deliverables, timeline, and terms for a consulting or services engagement.
distinguishing_characteristics: Contains explicit deliverables or work products
References a master agreement or contract
Includes pricing, rates, or total engagement value

fields.name: vendor_name
fields.description: The service provider or consulting firm

fields.name: project_name
fields.description: Name or title of the engagement

fields.name: deliverables
fields.description: Work products or deliverables to be produced

fields.name: milestones
fields.description: Key milestones with dates or durations

fields.name: parties
fields.description: All named parties to the agreement

fields.name: payment_terms
fields.description: Payment schedule, rates, or billing terms

fields.name: scope_summary
fields.description: High-level description of work in scope
